case_title: ZUMOT, TALAL VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THIS IS A CLAIM AGAINST A GOVT AGENCY.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO NON-APPERANCES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY ZUMOT, TALAL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-11-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-22-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 6/22/01 AT 130PM, AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
